subject: fix(docs): correct stale documentation and enforce convention consistency
body:
Full codebase audit found documentation drift and convention violations:
- CLAUDE.md: fix tutorial step count (6→7), arc count (~149→~143), add
  missing working docs to project structure
- usePWAInstall: replace 4 direct localStorage calls with safeStorage
  wrappers (convention violation)
- ConfirmDialog: refactor to use shared useFocusTrap hook with new
  initialFocusRef parameter instead of inline duplication
- graph-wiki-discovery.md: update stale demo data counts (was from
  original 12-company dataset, now 109 nodes/143 arcs)
- SESSION_NOTES.md: fix stale queryEngine.ts line count (878→831)
- TODO.md: populate tech debt backlog with identified items
- demoData.ts: fix stale arc count in code comment

Tags: docs, conventions, audit, cleanup, accessibility
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-audit
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RQuVZgVnAauqeK7Wi98rrn
title: correct stale documentation and enforce convention consistency
